---
title: "Pichugin Lab"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}

# Welcome to the Pichugin Lab

**Understanding the evolutionary dynamics of Malaria**

[View Publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg .me-2}
[Lab Resources](resources.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}

:::

## Research Overview

Our laboratory investigates the evolutionary and ecological processes that shape Malaria antigenic and genomic diversity. 

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}


### Plasmodium falciparum 
We develop and analyze mathematical models of natural selection, genetic drift, and eco-evolutionary dynamics.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### Phylogenetics 
We build simulation frameworks to explore the emergence of cooperation, altruism, and social behavior.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### Open Science
We make our code, data, and analyses publicly available to support reproducible research. Explore our [GitHub organization](https://github.com/Pichugin-Lab).
:::

:::
